name: GPU Frequency
description: Real-time Intel iGPU frequency and utilization monitor. Reads gt_cur / act / min / max / boost frequencies from /sys/class/drm and renders as a compact bar pill with a hover-able details tooltip.
author: keviis850

settingDescriptions.gpuCard: DRM card identifier (e.g., card0, card1). Leave empty for auto-detection.
settingDescriptions.autoDetectCard: Automatically detect an available Intel iGPU if the configured card is missing.
settingDescriptions.showMax: Display maximum frequency alongside current frequency.
settingDescriptions.showUtil: Show GPU utilization percentage when available.
settingDescriptions.pollIntervalMs: Polling interval in milliseconds for reading sysfs files.
